# `polars selector unsigned-integer` for [expression](/commands/categories/expression.md)

<div class='command-title'>Select all unsigned integer columns.</div>

## Signature

```> polars selector unsigned-integer {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input | output          |
| ----- | --------------- |
| any   | polars_selector |
## Examples

Select all unsigned integer columns
```nu
> {
        "foo": ["x", "y"],
        "bar": [123, 200],
        "baz": [2.0, 5.5],
    } |
    polars into-df --as-columns -s {foo: str, bar: u8, baz: f32}|
    polars select (polars selector unsigned-integer) |
    polars collect
╭───┬─────╮
│ # │ bar │
├───┼─────┤
│ 0 │ 123 │
│ 1 │ 200 │
╰───┴─────╯

```
